scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @wearable-analytics/shared && npm run build --workspace @wearable-analytics/api && npm run build --workspace @wearable-analytics/web

scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @wearable-analytics/shared && npm run test --workspace @wearable-analytics/api && npm run test --workspace @wearable-analytics/web
